svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="体系本质" id="system-essence"> <mxGraphModel dx="-514" dy="-112" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="980" pageHeight="340" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="GRP" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="体系的本质:把经验外化成机器可执行的流程,经验从「个人的」变「团队的杠杆」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="280" width="920" x="30" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EXP" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="老兵的经验
判断 / 规范 / 约束" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="60" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SYS" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="命令 + 评审 + 规范
(固化进仓库)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="340" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="AGENT" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="一群 Agent" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="620" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="OUT" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="近百万行
质量受控" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="820" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LOOP" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="反过来沉淀经验(事故即规范)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="240" x="320" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E1" edge="1" parent="1" source="EXP" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="SYS" value="固化"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E2" edge="1" parent="1" source="SYS" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="AGENT" value="驱动"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E3" edge="1" parent="1" source="AGENT" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="OUT" value="产出"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E4" edge="1" parent="1" source="SYS" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;" target="EXP"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 250, 252), rgb(21, 23, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 918px; height: 1px; padding-top: 13px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
